items.how_used: 使用 Dijkstra 算法和 Floyd-Warshall 算法计算各区域间最短通行时间，最终采用 Floyd 算法构建距离矩阵。
items.source_excerpt: determine the shortest time it takes to commute between different zones, which we solved by employing both the Dijkstra's Algorithm and the Floyd–Warshall Algorithm, favoring the latter in practice.

items.how_used: 应用遍历树（Traversing Tree）方法，通过树遍历编程方法覆盖所有区域，用于问题1和2的求解。
items.source_excerpt: we applied the Tree Traversal programming method to Questions 1&2, and obtained solutions that succeeded in covering the entire region.

items.how_used: 使用标准差作为确定最优解的方法，在优化方案中比较不同布局的覆盖重叠度和响应时间。
items.source_excerpt: We used standard deviation as a method of determining the best solutions among the optimized ones.

items.how_used: 在灾难场景中，采用 SIR 模型模拟传染病扩散，作为扩散模型（Epidemic Model）的一部分。
items.source_excerpt: Using formulas from Richter's Magnitude Scale and the SIR Model we compiled 2 constructive plans on how to deal with these disasters.

items.how_used: 在灾难场景中，针对随机区域爆发的灾难，采用重叠覆盖方案确保多辆救护车待命。
items.source_excerpt: In case of sporadic outbreaks in random areas, we applied the aforementioned plan with large area overlaps so that enough ambulances will be on standby once 1 has been dispatched to deal with a crisis case.

items.how_used: 通过分析模型强度和不足进行模型分析，包括强度分析和改进分析。
items.source_excerpt: 7.1 Model Analysis ... Strengths Analysis ... Improvement Analysis

items.how_used: 明确列出4条假设，包括半完美条件、人口稳定、8分钟定义、传染病传播立即开始。
在变量说明部分定义所有关键变量，如 i, j, k 表示救护车所在区域，h(x) 为逻辑判别数组等。
